description: Snapshot of identity_embeddings + persons gallery state at HEAD. Pure read of bundled-pg :55444 / f1photo_prod. No side effects.

per_person_distribution._note: persons row count = 127 in main table; 4 cold-start persons exist with zero embeddings (likely never had a seed photo successfully run through worker). 131 = 127 with-embed-count rows + 4 zero-embed persons (the with-rows include 6+121=127 → matches persons total).

derived._note: 127 - 119 = 8 persons enrolled but never re-matched any query photo to produce an incremental embed; plus 4 with literally zero seed gallery rows. Total 'incomplete' = 12. Healthy enrolled = 119/127 = 93.7%.

recommendations: 4 zero-embed persons are likely id-photo-2a Path A rows where the seed upload failed inference. Worth a forensic SQL pass on photos.recognition_status for those persons' seed photos before any retrain gate calculation.
8 'initial-only' persons are not necessarily broken — they just haven't been queried against. Expected if those personas never appeared in a wo_raw query photo since enrollment.
No tool/device identity_embeddings yet (#2a-tool merged but no real tool seed photos uploaded). King has not yet provided client operational tool photos so this is on-plan.
